reforms.description: The Industrial Revitalisation Law was legislated to enhance the innovation landscape by granting researchers intellectual property rights on government-sponsored research and returning these rights to private-sector researchers to encourage their exploitation, thereby strengthening industrial competitiveness.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing intellectual property rights encourages innovation and commercialization of research, which can lead to increased productivity and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been successfully implemented as part of the Industrial Revitalisation Law.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant structural change in the management of intellectual property rights, impacting the innovation landscape.
reforms.source_quote: The government has decided to begin to hand back to private-sector researchers the intellectual property rights on research they have conducted on its behalf.

reforms.description: The Japanese government implemented various measures to support start-ups and venture businesses, including tax and lending programmes, a revised law to promote venture businesses, and an increase in credit guarantees for SMEs, all aimed at fostering innovation and creating employment opportunities.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Supporting start-ups and venture businesses enhances innovation, creates jobs, and stimulates economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The measures have been successfully implemented to support start-ups and venture businesses.
reforms.importance_rationale: The comprehensive nature of the reforms represents a significant structural change in the support for start-ups and venture businesses.
reforms.source_quote: A revised law was implemented in January 1999 to these ends. It also aimed to encourage existing companies that have abundant managerial resources... to make aggressive efforts towards the development and expansion of new lines of business.

reforms.description: The government is planning to set up a series of venture-capital funds in collaboration with the private sector to provide financial support to promising start-up companies.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Establishing venture-capital funds will facilitate access to finance for start-ups, promoting innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The initiative has been officially announced but not yet implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: While significant, the initiative is part of a broader strategy and does not represent a complete overhaul of the system.
reforms.source_quote: The government is also planning to join with the private sector to set up a series of venture-capital funds to provide cash to promising start-up companies.

reforms.description: The Japanese tax system introduced a special tax credit for incremental R&D expenditures and included new initiatives in various technologies aimed at stimulating demand and supporting recovery from the Asian crisis.
reforms.package_name: R&D Tax Incentives and Technology Initiatives
reforms.component_name: R&D Tax Credit and Technology Initiatives
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Encouraging R&D investments through tax credits and technology initiatives can lead to increased innovation and economic recovery.
reforms.status_evidence: The tax credit and initiatives have been successfully implemented as part of the fiscal package.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reforms are significant but do not represent a fundamental change in the overall innovation policy framework.
reforms.source_quote: Preferential tax terms (allowances, credits, etc.) are also given to promote policy objectives such as energy conservation, pollution control, promotion of small to medium-sized business and promotion of R&D.
